description: accesso provides ticketing, point-of-sale, queueing, and guest experience software for attractions and venues. Its Guest Experience platform APIs support identity, content, commerce, telemetry, tagging, coupons, and data export use cases.
summary: accesso exposes a developer portal for its Guest Experience platform with multiple documented REST APIs (Identity, Commerce, Core, Content, Data Export, User Tag, User Coupon) using OAuth2 bearer-token-based authentication and service-account flows.

surfaces.name: accesso Guest Experience User Coupon API
accesso Guest Experience Data Export API
